en: Hello everyone. Here we go.
A: Please stand up! Salute!
B: Hello.
A: Please sit down.

ab: ’inavayan mapiya. harem kana wari panadam na sinsi za kemudakuda ta temarapinuyumayan kana aekanan.
ch: 大家好。今天老師要教大家食物的卑南語怎麼說。
en: Hello everyone. Today I am going to teach you how to say \\\"puyuma\\\" (food).

ab: malrazam u za aeman kema na sinsi?
en: A: Do you understand what the teacher says?

ab: sinsi, ’azi ku malrazam. karuwa u masalr ziya merengay?
ch: B:老師，我不懂。你可以再說一次嗎?
en: B: I don’t understand. Can you repeat it again?

ab: ’azi ku kinger, karuwa u kema’izang merengay?
ch: B:我聽不到，你可以大聲一點嗎?
en: B: I can’t hear you, can you speak louder?

ab: ’alra zi na’u i kani! kurelrang kaninku mip za parasan.
ch: 請看這裡!跟著我唸一遍。
en: Look here, please! Repeat after me.

ab: ’alra zi na’u i kani! kurelrang kaninku miyup za parasan.
ch: 請看這裡! 跟著我唸一遍。
en: Look here, please! Repeat after me.
You read it very well.
You read it very well.

ab: ip ziya masalr. zi ka’izangu nu lrengaw za saema.
en: Read it again. And a little louder.

ab: iyup ziya masalr. zi ka’izangu nu lrengaw za saema.
en: Read it again. And a little louder.
Please be quiet. Don’t talk to each other.
A: Please take out your textbook.
B: Yes, sir.
A: Please take out your pen.

ab: sinsi, malalup ku murung za impis.
en: B: I forgot to bring my pen.
A: Please take out the eraser.

ab: sinsi, malalup ku murung za aitrul.
en: B: I forgot to bring my eraser.

ab: kivulas tu aitrul kananu lralrang i trapingiran.
ch: A:請跟旁邊同學借橡皮擦。
en: A: Please borrow erasers from your classmates.
B: Can I borrow your eraser?
Class is over.

ab: ta palruwanay nanta takakesiyan i kani, marepana’uwa ta ziya nu masalr kana liyusan.
ch: 我們就上到這邊，下週再見。
en: Class dismissed, see you next week.
